summary: Tested Essentials page BLOCK 115.1 (Groove Gateway) and BLOCK 115.2 (Groove Terminal) branded partner hand-off experiences. Most features working correctly, one z-index bug found.

ui_bugs.issue: Close button (X) is not clickable - navbar intercepts pointer events. Close button at top=69px overlaps with navbar bottom=90px. Despite modal z-index 200000 > navbar z-index 100000, click events are intercepted by navbar.
ui_bugs.workaround: JavaScript click works - modal.close() can be triggered programmatically. Backdrop click should work but also affected.

issues: Modal header starts at top=55px which overlaps with 90px navbar, causing close button interception issue

essentials_page.6_product_cards: PASS - All 6 products displayed (shield, vault, polish, cracked-ice, lovely, pearl-shimmer)
essentials_page.approved_seals: PASS - All 6 'Honey Groove Approved' badges present
essentials_page.amazon_cta_text: PASS - 3 Amazon items show 'Acquire via The Honey Groove Partner'
essentials_page.vinylsupplyco_cta_text: PASS - 3 VinylSupplyCo items show 'Browse Curated Boutique'
essentials_page.deprecated_text_removed: PASS - No 'Honeypot Partner', 'Nectar', or 'Shop on Amazon' in product area

groove_gateway_modal.handoff_phase: PASS - Shows product image, THE GROOVE GATEWAY header, partner text
groove_gateway_modal.auto_new_tab: PASS - Opens new tab after 1.5s delay
groove_gateway_modal.acquire_button: PASS - Gold 'ACQUIRE VIA THE HONEY GROOVE PARTNER' button

groove_terminal_modal.gold_x_button: PRESENT but NOT CLICKABLE due to navbar interception
groove_terminal_modal.loading_spinner: PARTIAL - Did not see loading spinner (iframe may have loaded quickly)
groove_terminal_modal.iframe_or_fallback: PASS - iframe loaded with opacity=1 (VinylSupplyCo allows embedding)
groove_terminal_modal.fallback_not_shown: N/A - iframe loaded successfully, fallback not triggered

action_items: FIX: GrooveTerminalModal close button z-index/position - either add margin-top to modal so it starts below navbar OR set pointer-events:none on navbar when modal is open
Consider adding Escape key handler to close modals
critical_code_review_comments: Modal z-index is 200000 but the modal content starts at top=55px which overlaps with 90px navbar. The close button needs to be positioned below the navbar or navbar needs pointer-events:none when modal is open
context_for_next_testing_agent: GrooveTerminalModal close button has z-index overlap with navbar. Test after fix by clicking the X button without force=True. All other Essentials page features working correctly.
